description.overview: The smallest of the Portuguese Podengos, these rabbit-hunting dogs are lively, alert companions. They're charming, playful dogs with a primitive appearance.
description.history: The Portuguese Podengo Pequeno originated in Portugal.
description.temperament: Known for being lively, alert, playful.
description.grooming: Requires regular grooming appropriate for their smooth or wire coat.
description.exercise: Exercise needs match their energy level.

best_for: Those wanting a unique small breed
verdict.summary: The smallest of the Portuguese Podengos, these rabbit-hunting dogs are lively, alert companions. They're charming, playful dogs with a primitive appearance.
